pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge exclusion of Data Quality (composite 0.405)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality at ~85% market presence. Data quality standards and validation central to all annotator roles. Exclusion consistent with role scope.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent. Final decision: exclude.
